question:
Telstar 1963 vs. SBV Excelsior: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming Eredivisie game between Telstar 1963 and SBV Excelsior, scheduled for November 1 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Telstar 1963 and SBV Excelsior each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on eredivisie.nl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.eredivisie.nl/
